title: BOZ Insulated Tumbler - Stainless Steel Cup with Lid and Straw - Perfect for Hot and Cold Drinks - BPA Free (900 ml / 30oz, Pink)
features: ✅ TWO WAYS TO DRINK! BOZ Tumbler Lid lands a different kind of punch! Featuring both a straw and flip-top lid, the tumbler with straw makes it easy to drink both hot and cold drinks on the go. The added seal-proof lid prevent spills and keeps your drink fresh. Whether you're drinking coffee, tea, ice cold water, or a smoothie, this tumbler can handle it all. The BOZ Tumbler is perfect for a variety of occasions, from morning commutes to road trips to outdoor adventures.

✅ DOUBLE WALL INSULATION: The BOZ Cup with straw and lid for adults is double-walled insulated and keeps your drinks at the perfect temperature for hours. This feature makes it ideal for outdoor activities, traveling, or long work hours. You can enjoy your favorite drink at the perfect temperature without having to worry about it. It is made from high-quality stainless steel that ensures durability, and reliability. It is resistant to corrosion and rust, making it long-lasting that you can use it for years to come.

✅ SIZE: The BOZ 30oz (900 mL) size tumbler is perfect for those who order a large and prefer a larger capacity to hold their beverages. It is designed to fit venti/trenta size drinks from popular coffee, tea, smoothie chains, so it is easy to take your favorite drinks with you on the go. It also makes it an ideal choice for those who want to increase their daily water intake, as it allows you to track your water consumption and ensure that you are staying hydrated throughout the day.

✅ COLORS TO SUIT YOUR STYLE: All of these water cup with straw and lids options come in multiple colors to suit your style. Whether you prefer bold and bright colors or more subdued tones, there's an option for everyone. This feature allows you to choose a drinkware option that not only suits your needs but also your personal style. Available in Dark Green, Black, Blue and Pink.

✅ LEAK-PROOF AND SPILL-PROOF: The BOZ insulated cup with straw and lid is designed to be leak-proof and spill-proof, which means you can carry it around without worrying about spills or leaks. This is especially useful if you are on the go and need to transport your drink without any mess. Its sturdy construction ensures that it can withstand daily wear and tear, making it a great investment for those who want a durable tumbler.

✅ EASY TO CLEAN: The BOZ insulated tumbler with straw is easy to clean and maintain, thanks to its stainless steel construction. Simply rinse it out with soap and water, and it can be cleaned in the dishwasher without any fear of damage or deterioration. Its durable construction ensures that it can withstand frequent use and cleaning without losing its shape or integrity. The tumbler is also resistant to stains and odors, making it a hygienic choice for everyday use.
